title: Boing!
description: A Mod adding rubber swords to minecraft made for modfest: toybox
body:
# Boing!
Boing! is a mod made for modfest: toybox which adds Rubber swords to minecraft.

Currently, we have items such as:

Rubber Swords: A new weapon type crafted with rubber which flings whoever you hit with it backwards
and Rubber: a new resource obtained through blasting resin bricks in a blast furnace used in crafting items added by the mod

# Permissions
While you are allowed to place this mod in modpacks, servers, etc you are not allowed to reuse, redistrubute or steal assets or code from this mod.

How can I support the mod?
First of all, you can support me on kofi! If you can't do that, also consider joining my Discord or following my Bluesky!
